name: @sig-net/midnight-contract
description: The central signet Compact contract on Midnight: the MPC posts signature responses (unauthenticated counted log, verified off-chain) and remote execution responses (Schnorr attestations, verified in-circuit at post time) here; clients poll it. src/index.ts is the curated export surface.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && ls src/managed/keys/*.prover >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'signet-contract build: no prover keys in src/managed/keys — run `yarn compile:zk` first (compile uses --skip-zk)' >&2; exit 1; } && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/managed && cp -R src/managed/contract src/managed/compiler src/managed/zkir src/managed/keys dist/managed/
